prompt: Determine whether the work meets the applicable code, spec, drawing, or manufacturer requirement.
scenario: You are on a residential job — a service call, remodel, or homeowner installation with prescriptive code and manufacturer instructions. The work under review is Roofing, part of the Carpentry & Finishes scope. The observed field condition is: nail placement high/exposed. The work is roughed in — installed or assembled, but not yet closed out. Reference material on hand: IRC R905, mfr specs.
title: Compliance check: Roofing (residential job)
